Name: EASTMAN EPD 010A Drill 10mm Chuck 450W Power Variable Speed Reversible Motor 3 Free Bits Carbon Set Wood Metal DIY Home Repair
Description: ULTRA-LIGHTWEIGHT 1.50KG DESIGN: Solves the struggle of arm strain; specifically engineered to be the lightest in its class, this drill is perfect for extended use, overhead drilling, and users who find standard heavy-duty tools difficult to control. EFFICIENT 450W VARIABLE SPEED MOTOR: The perfect balance of power and control; the 450W motor tackles household drilling tasks with ease, while the 0-2800 RPM variable speed trigger allows you to start slow for precision and speed up for efficiency. 3 FREE DRILL BITS INCLUDED: Ready to use right out of the box; this value-packed kit solves your immediate accessory needs by including three essential drill bits (sized 6mm for Wood and Metal), saving you an extra trip to the hardware store. REVERSIBLE SCREWDRIVING FUNCTION: More than just a drill; the forward/reverse switch allows you to easily drive screws in or back them out, making it an ideal 2-in-1 tool for furniture assembly and cabinet repairs. › See more product detail
